product.name: ArInter
product.titleDescriptor: Tension Fabric Stuctures for Inside Decoration
product.specLine: 250 g/m², 92% Polyester 8% Elastane, Flexible, Dirt Repellent, Antibacterial, Tension Fabric
descriptions: ArInter can be used by designers and architects to decorate an environment and
to give function to the area.
It is possible to add extra function like high visibility. The fabric has odor cleaning photocatalytic function.
Flame retardant function is usefull for indoor usage.
Any aestetic properties can be added by creating flat or curved shapes, globes,
Tension Fabric Stuctures for Inside Decoration
250 g/m², 92% Polyester 8% Elastane, Flexible, Dirt Repellent, Antibacterial, Tension Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: Tension Fabric Stuctures for Inside Decoration
'ArInter can be used by designers and architects to decorate an environment'
Application image labels: Turkmenistan Airport, TRT Studio, Neomarin Shopping Center
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicitly marketed as a tension fabric structure for interior/architectural decoration, used in building projects like an airport and shopping center, matching architecture-building's tensile structure and interior textile system criteria.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Hi-vis property and EN ISO 20471 norm listed, but no explicit statement of use as high-visibility safety apparel—this is an interior decoration fabric, not a garment.
Antibacterial property present, but no explicit medical/healthcare use stated; product is positioned for interior decoration.
Application image label mentions 'Turkmenistan Airport' but this reflects an architectural installation in a building, not vehicle/vessel use.
